name: agent-mesh
description: Static per-folder MCP delegation mesh for Claude Code agents, with a read-only dashboard (session log + management + result canvas).
//devDependencies: NIGHTLY-ONLY. The per-PR L0 gate (ci.yml → node run-all-tests.mjs) installs NOTHING and must stay zero-dependency: run-all-tests.mjs only discovers top-level test/*.test.js, never test/ui/ or test/e2e/. These devDeps power the nightly integration.yml front-end QA jobs (jsdom+axe component tier; Playwright e2e/visual). Pinned to EXACT versions for a reproducible lockfile. See docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-20-frontend-qa-plan-3-nightly-devdep.md.
